things.name: Khast Imam Complex (Hazrati Imam)
things.description: Central Asia's most important Islamic complex with the world's oldest Quran

things.name: Chorsu Bazaar
things.description: Ancient domed market at the heart of the old town - one of Central Asia's great bazaars

things.name: Independence Square (Mustaqillik Maydoni)
things.description: Soviet-era Friendship of Nations Square transformed into Uzbekistan's independence monument

things.name: Museum of Applied Arts
things.description: 19th-century diplomat's house with exceptional collection of Uzbek crafts and decorative arts

things.name: Amir Timur Museum
things.description: Blue-domed museum dedicated to Tamerlane with exhibits on the Timurid Empire

things.name: Tashkent Metro
things.description: Soviet-era metro with ornate stations decorated with marble, chandeliers and mosaics

things.name: Old City (Eski Shahar)
things.description: Historic quarter with narrow streets, mosques and the Juma (Friday) Mosque

things.name: Samarkand Day Trip
things.description: High-speed train to Samarkand - the ancient Silk Road city with Timur's monuments

things.name: Alisher Navoi Opera Theatre
things.description: Stunning 1947 opera house blending Uzbek architectural styles with Soviet classicism

things.name: Tashkentland Amusement Park
things.description: Popular family entertainment park in the heart of the city
